password.title: Secure Password Generator & Strength Checker
password.description: Generate cryptographically secure passwords and check password strength instantly. Customizable options with real-time analysis.

ascii.title: ASCII Table - Complete Character Reference
ascii.description: Complete ASCII character table with hex, octal, HTML, and decimal codes. Interactive reference with search and filtering.

htmlcode.title: HTML Entity Encoder & Decoder
htmlcode.description: Encode and decode HTML special characters and entities. Full reference with named, decimal, and hex entity codes.

httpstatus.title: HTTP Status Code Reference - Complete Guide
httpstatus.description: Complete HTTP status code reference with descriptions, RFC references, and usage guides. Covers all IANA-registered codes plus common unofficial codes.

base64.title: Base64 Encoder & Decoder
base64.description: Encode and decode Base64 strings with Basic Authentication header support. Real-time bidirectional conversion with configurable charset.

hashing.title: Hash Generator - MD5, SHA-256, SHA-512
hashing.description: Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-224, SHA-256, SHA-384, SHA-512, SHA3, and RIPEMD-160 hashes with HMAC support.

checksum.title: File Checksum Calculator - MD5, SHA-256
checksum.description: Calculate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, and SHA-512 checksums for any file. Supports unlimited file size.

cipher.title: Text Encrypt & Decrypt - AES, DES, RC4
cipher.description: Encrypt and decrypt text using AES, DES, Triple DES, Rabbit, RC4, and RC4Drop with configurable block modes.

storageunit.title: Storage Unit Converter - Bytes to TB
storageunit.description: Convert between bytes, KB, MB, GB, TB, PB and more. Supports both SI (decimal) and IEC (binary) standards.

cssunit.title: CSS Unit Converter - px to rem, em, vw, vh
cssunit.description: Convert between CSS units (px, rem, em, vw, vh) with customizable base values. Batch convert CSS code and reference lookup table.

uuid.title: UUID Generator - v4, v7 Random UUID
uuid.description: Generate v1/v3/v4/v5/v7 UUIDs conforming to RFC 4122/9562. Supports bulk generation and multiple output formats.

urlencoder.title: URL Encoder & Decoder
urlencoder.description: Encode and decode URL strings with Component, Whole URL, and Form modes. Includes a reserved-character reference table.

yaml.title: YAML Converter - JSON to YAML & YAML to JSON
yaml.description: Convert between JSON and YAML formats with full YAML 1.2 support. Handles multi-document YAML, anchors, and aliases.

diff.title: Diff Checker - Compare Text Online
diff.description: Compare two texts or code snippets with line and word-level precision. Side-by-side or inline view with collapsible unchanged regions.

markdown.title: Markdown Editor with Live Preview
markdown.description: Write and preview Markdown with GitHub Flavored Markdown support. Includes syntax highlighting, Mermaid diagrams, and PDF/PNG export.

json.title: JSON Formatter & Validator
json.description: Format, compress, and validate JSON. Pretty-print with configurable indentation, minify to single line, or parse JSON5.

sqlformat.title: SQL Formatter - Format & Minify SQL Online
sqlformat.description: Format and minify SQL queries with syntax highlighting. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQL Server and more.

jsonts.title: JSON to TypeScript - Generate Interfaces & Types from JSON
jsonts.description: Convert JSON or JSON5 to TypeScript interfaces and type definitions. Supports nested objects, union types, array merging, and JSON5.

dbviewer.title: SQLite Viewer - Browse & Query .db Files
dbviewer.description: Open SQLite databases, browse schema, run read-only SQL with autocomplete, paginate large result sets, and export to CSV or JSON.

jwt.title: JWT Debugger - Encode, Decode & Verify
jwt.description: Encode, decode, and verify JSON Web Tokens (JWT). Supports HS256, RS256, ES256, PS256 and more algorithms.

unixtime.title: Unix Timestamp Converter - Seconds & Milliseconds
unixtime.description: Convert between Unix timestamps and human-readable dates. Supports seconds and milliseconds, shows Local and UTC side-by-side with a live clock.

cron.title: Cron Expression Generator & Explainer
cron.description: Build and decode Cron expressions for Standard, Spring, and Quartz schedulers. See human-readable explanations and the next 5 execution times.

qrcode.title: QR Code Generator - Text, URL, WiFi
qrcode.description: Generate styled QR codes for text, URLs, WiFi, vCard, email, and SMS. Custom colors, logos, dot styles, and SVG/PNG export.

textcase.title: Text Case Converter - camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case
textcase.description: Convert text between camelCase, PascalCase, snake_case, CONSTANT_CASE, kebab-case, dot.case, Title Case and more.

deduplines.title: Remove Duplicate Lines - Deduplicate Text Online
deduplines.description: Remove duplicate lines from text with options for case sensitivity, whitespace trimming, and empty line removal.

color.title: Color Converter & Picker - HEX, RGB, HSL, OKLCH
color.description: Convert HEX, RGB, HSL, HSV, CMYK, LAB, OKLCH. Visual picker with eyedropper, palette generator, image color extraction, WCAG + APCA contrast, and color-blindness preview.

regex.title: Regex Tester & Live Regex Editor
regex.description: Test regular expressions in real-time with match highlighting, capture group inspection, and replacement preview. Built-in preset library and token-level explanation.

csv-md.title: CSV ↔ Markdown Table Converter
csv-md.description: Convert between CSV and Markdown Table formats. Adjust column alignment, delimiters, and layout with real-time bidirectional conversion.

csv.title: CSV Converter - JSON to CSV Online
csv.description: Convert between JSON and CSV formats. Handles nested objects, custom delimiters, and provides a tabular data preview.

numbase.title: Number Base Converter - Binary, Octal, Hex, Decimal
numbase.description: Convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal with real-time sync. Supports 8/16/32/64-bit two's complement, bit visual editor.

image-resize.title: Image Resizer - Resize Images Online
image-resize.description: Resize images by percentage or custom dimensions. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP input. All processing runs in your browser.

image-compress.title: Image Compressor - Compress PNG, JPG, WebP
image-compress.description: Compress images with adjustable quality. Drag-to-compare preview. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP. All processing runs in your browser.

image-convert.title: Image Format Converter - PNG, JPG, WebP
image-convert.description: Convert images between PNG, JPG, and WebP formats. All processing runs in your browser.

image-crop.title: Image Cropper - Crop Images Online
image-crop.description: Crop images with free selection, preset aspect ratios, or exact pixel dimensions. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP. All processing runs in your browser.

image-rotate.title: Image Rotator - Rotate & Flip Images Online
image-rotate.description: Rotate images by 90°, 180°, or 270° and flip horizontally or vertically. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP. All processing runs in your browser.

extractor.title: Email & URL Extractor - Extract Emails, URLs, Phone Numbers Online
extractor.description: Extract emails, URLs, and phone numbers from any text instantly. Deduplicated results with CSV, JSON, and TXT export.

wordcounter.title: Word Counter - Character Count, Reading Time, Keyword Density
wordcounter.description: Count words, characters, sentences, and paragraphs. Estimate reading and speaking time. Analyze keyword frequency and density for SEO.

tokencounter.title: Token Counter - OpenAI GPT Token Count & BPE Visualization
tokencounter.description: Count OpenAI GPT tokens (o200k_base) with real-time BPE tokenization visualization. Supports GPT-4o, GPT-4.1, o1, o3, o4-mini, GPT-5.

sshkey.title: SSH Key Generator - Generate RSA & Ed25519 Key Pairs Online
sshkey.description: Generate SSH key pairs (RSA, Ed25519) entirely in your browser. Supports passphrase encryption, fingerprint display, and public key inspection.

httpclient.title: HTTP Client - Online REST API Tester
httpclient.description: Send HTTP requests and test REST APIs directly in your browser. Supports GET, POST, PUT, DELETE with headers, body, and auth.

wallet.title: HD Wallet Generator - BIP39 Mnemonic & Multi-Chain Address Derivation
wallet.description: Generate BIP39 mnemonic phrases and derive cryptocurrency addresses for EVM, Bitcoin, Solana, Tron, and Cosmos chains. Free online HD wallet tool — 100% client-side.

bip39.title: BIP39 Word List - Complete Mnemonic Word Reference
bip39.description: Complete BIP39 mnemonic word list reference with search. All 2048 words in the standard English BIP39 word list, searchable by index or substring.

subnet.title: IP Subnet Calculator - IPv4/IPv6 CIDR & VLSM
subnet.description: IPv4/IPv6 CIDR calculator with subnet splitter and VLSM allocator. Compute network address, broadcast, host range, and subnet mask — 100% client-side.

recipe.title: Recipe - Data Recipe Builder
recipe.description: Chain multiple operations together into a recipe. Compose text and image processing steps CyberChef-style. All data stays in your browser.

batch.title: Batch Processor - Bulk Operation Tool | OmniKit
batch.description: Apply a single operation to multiple inputs at once. Batch encode, hash, compress, and convert files and text.

pdf-merge.title: PDF Merger - Combine Multiple PDFs into One
pdf-merge.description: Merge multiple PDF files into a single document. Drag-and-drop reorder, thumbnail preview, and instant download. All processing runs in your browser.

pdf-split.title: PDF Split - Split PDF into Pages or Ranges
pdf-split.description: Split a PDF into separate pages, custom ranges, or hand-picked selections. Thumbnail preview, ZIP download. All processing runs in your browser.

image-watermark.title: Image Watermark - Add Text or Logo Watermark
image-watermark.description: Add text or logo watermarks to images. Customize position, opacity, rotation, and tiling. Supports PNG, JPG, WebP. All processing runs in your browser.
